name: Redirect Management
description: URL redirect management with exact, partial, and regex matching
author: ahaas

autoOffloadEnabled.label: Auto-Sync to Cloudflare
autoOffloadEnabled.description: Automatically sync eligible redirects (EXACT/WILDCARD with 301/302/307/308) to Cloudflare Bulk Redirects. Requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID environment variables.
